note: Temporary architecture exceptions. Every entry must have an owner, a concrete reason, and an expiry date. Expired entries fail CI.

entries.reason: PULSE live organism collector landed as a new runtime backbone and still needs decomposition into smaller services.
Legacy analytics page only received a minimal lint-safe control-flow fix; full decomposition remains separate work.
Initial monorepo ratchet collector centralizes metric extraction and will be split after the baseline hardening is stable.
The ratchet collector must enumerate literal `any` detection patterns and counters to measure the repository honestly.
The ratchet collector must reference the literal @ts-ignore directive to measure policy violations.
The ratchet collector must reference the literal eslint-disable directive to measure policy violations.
Central PULSE break-type registry is still monolithic; this change only extends it with the new contract enforcement types.
Backlog orchestration is still decomposing; this PR only hardens the queue boundary.
Catchup flow still lives in a legacy file while queue contracts are being tightened.
Autopilot worker is the primary decomposition hotspot; this PR only adds typed contract parsing at the boundary.
Legacy WhatsApp API controller remains oversized; this PR only corrects the QR response contract and related convergence gates.
Public auth shell is still oversized; this PR only stabilizes reduced-motion rendering and visual baselines before a separate decomposition pass.
Landing shell is still monolithic; this PR only removes nondeterministic public-motion behavior and freezes visual snapshots.
Legacy Kloel orchestration file only received anti-hardcode convergence fixes and Sentry cleanup support in this PR; decomposition remains separate work.
Chat container is still monolithic; this PR only removes fake reasoning trace hardcode and preserves the existing shell.
Dashboard surface only received anti-hardcode trace cleanup in this PR; full split stays on the convergence backlog.
Inbox workspace shell only received chat typography minimum fixes and contract cleanup in this PR; decomposition remains pending.

The visual critical-flow harness grew to freeze runtime state, normalize auth hosts, and prove deterministic screenshots across public and authenticated routes; decomposition of helpers remains follow-up work.
The legacy products-new page only received deterministic visual shell wiring for the convergence baseline and still needs extraction into smaller route components.
The wallet surface only received deterministic styling and visual-baseline stabilization in this branch; decomposition of the monolithic screen remains pending.
The account view still lives in a legacy oversized component; this branch only touched visual determinism and reduced-motion-safe presentation for baseline proof.
The home dashboard remains monolithic; this branch only made greeting/date rendering deterministic for visual certification after rebasing onto main.
The product nerve center only received reduced-motion-safe animation handling and raster-stable visual adjustments; structural decomposition remains separate work.
The products catalog view remains a legacy giant; this branch only touched deterministic visual-shell behavior required to lock the new baseline.
The sales view only received deterministic presentation updates for the visual regression baseline and still needs a dedicated decomposition pass.
